home.title: Event group on Hytale
home.description: Pyrale is an event group on Hytale. Take part in unique events and join the community.

events.title: Events
events.description: Discover upcoming Pyrale events. Stay informed about announcements, dates, and must-see experiences.

about.title: About
about.description: Discover Pyrale, who we are, our organization, and the team behind the Hytale events.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with the Pyrale team via our contact form.

login.title: Log in
login.description: Log in to your Pyrale account and join our events.

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Create your Pyrale account and join our events.

about.title: We are Pyrale
about.subtitle: A group of enthusiasts dedicated to innovation to sustainably transform entertainment.

means.heading: A creative ideas laboratory
means.description: Imagine, design, test, iterate: a continuous cycle, just like the life of a butterfly. Pyrale is a laboratory of technical and creative ideas serving entertainment. We have a strong desire to innovate and iterate in all areas and never rest on our achievements.

organization.heading: A group of enthusiasts
organization.description: Pyrale is a non-profit organization driven by a volunteer team working on the project out of passion. We place great importance on transparency and honesty, both internally and with the community. Our decisions are made collectively, by consensus, a fundamental principle written into our statutes.

team.heading: The dream team
team.description: Meet the talents that make Pyrale a unique experience!

join.heading: Want to join us?
join.description: An organization driven by enthusiasts, open to anyone who wants to get involved.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Write to us using the form below, we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

success.title: Message sent
success.description: We'll get back to you as soon as possible

discord.heading: Got a question? We'll answer you on Discord
discord.description: If you prefer to chat live or follow our news in real time, join the Pyrale community.

hero.title: Group dedicated to organizing events on Hytale
hero.subtitle: We are a non-profit organization that creates and organizes community events around the game Hytale.

discord.heading: Don't miss any announcements
discord.description: Join our Discord to get early access to all Pyrale news and announcements.

event.subtitle: Our first events are currently in preparation, announcements will be published soon.
